title: agathophyllum marginatum
intro: Agathophyllum marginatum, also known as Creeping juniper or Creeping juniper tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Agathophyllum marginatum can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
